title: Ministry reporting export — JSON format
description: JSON schema for GET /api/export/exam-targets?format=json. Spec-only at Launch; spec-owned by docs/api/ministry-reporting-export-spec.md (prr-235). Implementation deferred to Q3.

export_meta.description: Non-student-identifying metadata about this export call.

schema_version.description: Export schema version. Bump when the rows shape changes.

tenant_id.description: Tenant identifier per ADR-0001. Derived from JWT; never from URL path.

enrollment_id.description: Enrollment identifier scoped to this export.

as_of.description: Point-in-time snapshot anchor. Defaults to the request processing time.

include.description: active = ArchivedAt is null; all = include archived targets too.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp the export was produced.

row_count.description: Number of row entries in rows[]. Matches rows.length for the page; use next_page_token for full traversal.

next_page_token.description: Opaque continuation token. Null when this is the last page.

student_id.description: Tenant-local stable id. Never a national id.

ministry_subject_code.description: Ministry subject code e.g. '035'. Null for non-Ministry catalogs (SAT/PET/IB).

ministry_question_paper_codes.description: שאלון codes. Non-empty for Bagrut-family ExamCodes, empty otherwise.

track.description: '2U'|'3U'|'4U'|'5U'|'ModuleA'..'ModuleG' or null when the exam has no track concept.

academic_year.description: Hebrew academic-year string (Ministry catalogs) or Gregorian year (non-Ministry).

source.description: Who assigned the target per ADR-0050 §Q3 lawful basis.

weekly_hours.description: Hours per week committed to this target.

archived_at.description: Null while active; terminal once set per ADR-0050 §6.

export_readiness.description: Classroom|Tenant → Exportable; Student|Migration → RequiresConsent (unless student consented).
